gaps.description: Docker/docker-compose files missing — Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml not found in project root or install/
README.md missing at project root — no install instructions or REST API documentation
CDN URL uses jsdelivr.net proxy, not the specified cdn.example.com — M1 DBB specifies exact URL
SIGINT graceful shutdown not fully verified — no explicit process.on('SIGINT') handler found in server or CLI entry
sense.js uses requestAnimationFrame (browser API) — not compatible with Node.js server-side execution
sense.detect() direct call not exported — only event-based API (on/start/stop), M4/M5 DBB expects detect(frame) export
store.js exports del() but not delete() — memory.js imports del correctly, but M4 DBB tests store.delete()
tool_use response format inconsistency — brain.js yields {type:'tool_use'} but M9 DBB expects text field in response
Admin panel (/admin) served as static dist — dist/admin directory may not exist if not built
Wake word detection (useWakeWord.js) exists in UI client but hub.js does not broadcast wakeword events
Test coverage >= 98% not verified — no coverage report found
heartbeat removes device after 40s (not 60s as specified in M7 DBB-005)
